title: ACTREC Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Various Medical Officer Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Medical Officer Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the MBBS can grab this chance and apply for the ACTREC Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
